sources.title: Jet Storm (restored, colorized) (1959, thriller, imdb score: 6.5)
sources.description: Jet Storm (also known as Jet Stream or Killing Urge ) is a 1959 British thriller film directed and co-written by Cy Endfield . Richard Attenborough stars with Stanley Baker , Hermione Baddeley and Diane Cilento . The film is a precursor to the later aviation disaster film genre such as Airport (1970).

metadata.Plot: Sir Richard Attenborough plays Ernest Tilley, a man who lost his daughter in a hit-and-run accident. He tracks down the man responsible for the accident and boards the same plane, threatening to blow up himself and everyone on board as an act of vengeance. What follows is an Airport-type movie with all the passengers having their own little subplots and fears.
metadata.Actors: Richard Attenborough, Stanley Baker, Hermione Baddeley
